channel.title: RSS Aggregator Feed
channel.description: An aggregated feed of Technology-related news

item.title: 8 Horror Movies to Welcome Spring’s Arrival
item.description: Killer plants, deadly getaways, and sinister rituals await.

item.title: Some writing advice from Project Hail Mary’s Andy Weir
item.description: Andy Weir has done pretty well when it comes to adaptations. His first novel, The Martian, was turned into a movie in 2015, and the Ridley Scott-directed picture earned more than $600 million at the box office. And Project Hail Mary just had a huge opening weekend that puts it on track to be one […]

item.title: Startup Gimlet Labs is solving the AI inference bottleneck in a surprisingly elegant way
item.description: Gimlet Labs just raised an $80 million Series A for tech that lets AI run across NVIDIA, AMD, Intel, ARM, Cerebras and d-Matrix chips, simultaneously.

item.title: Littlebird raises $11M for its AI-assisted ‘recall’ tool that reads your computer screen
item.description: Littlebird is building an AI that reads your screen in real time to capture context, answer questions, and automate tasks, without relying on screenshots.

item.title: FedEx is rolling out AI training to get 400,000 workers ‘promotion-ready’
item.description: FedEx is really thinking about how it implements AI – leaders take the time to select tools, and workers offered AI training.

item.title: Microsoft's eye-opening list of fixes for Windows 11 deals with most major pain points — and you can thank Apple
item.description: Is Microsoft now at panic stations with fixing all Windows 11's problems?

item.title: LG Sound Suite review: Dolby Atmos FlexConnect in a powerful package
item.description: The premise seems simple enough. LG promises that you can set its Sound Suite speakers anywhere and Dolby’s home theater tech will make them perform well. The soundbar, subwoofer and speakers don’t have to go in prescribed locations for the best results, which means you can place them where you need to and move them as you see fit. Of course, this all hinges on the reliability of the underlying tech and LG’s ability to make individual speakers that actually sound good. Like most premium soundbars and complete home theater setups these days, a complete Sound Suite collection is expensive. The ...

item.title: King Harold’s Legendary 200-Mile March ‘Never Happened,’ Study Suggests
item.description: “Only a mad general would force his army to go through that before a battle.”

item.title: Grab to buy Foodpanda Taiwan from Delivery Hero for $600 million
item.description: Grab will acquire Delivery Hero’s Foodpanda business in Taiwan for $600 million, expanding beyond Southeast Asia and setting up a closer challenge to Uber Eats in a tightly contested market.

item.title: Le retour d’Unlock Talk avec PP Garcia et double Matinale : voici notre programme Twitch de la semaine
item.description: Notre programme Twitch de la semaine du lundi 23 mars 2026, c’est juste ici : nous vous donnons rendez-vous, mercredi, jeudi et vendredi sur notre chaîne Frandroidlive, autant pour siroter votre café devant notre Matinale Tech' que pour profiter de la 46e d'Unlock Talk.

item.title: Pourquoi votre prochain smartphone milieu de gamme sera moins bien équipé que l’ancien
item.description: L'intelligence artificielle ne se contente plus de générer des images ou des textes : elle siphonne littéralement les stocks mondiaux de mémoire. Face à cette pénurie qui fait exploser les coûts, les fabricants de smartphones préparent une riposte radicale : recycler des technologies du passé pour sauver leurs marges.

item.title: DJI Mini 3 : cet excellent petit drone 4K profite de remises allant jusqu’à 150 € chez la Fnac
item.description: Amateurs de belles images aériennes, c’est le moment de craquer ! Le DJI Mini 3 voit son prix fondre à seulement 266 euros, contre 379 euros habituellement. On trouve aussi la version radiocommande avec écran à 349 euros au lieu de 499 euros.

item.title: Britain's compliance blind spot
item.description: Organizations understand what regulators want but are struggling to demonstrate that they are delivering it.

item.title: Apple’s four-pack of first-gen AirTags is down $60 for the first time
item.description: Despite the fact that Apple released a new AirTag in January, the first-gen AirTag is still a top-notch tracker if you’re embedded in Apple’s ecosystem. And right now, it’s on sale for $59.99 ($40 off) at Amazon, Walmart, and Best Buy, which marks a new low price. If you’re an iPhone owner, the original AirTag […]

item.title: In-hub motors make this humble Hyundai a monster on ice
item.description: In-wheel motors have been around since the very beginning of electric motoring. Ferdinand Porsche developed one way back in 1900, and the US sent them to the moon in our Lunar Roving Vehicles in the early '70s. But, outside of e-bikes, they've never really gone mainstream. It looked like Lordstown Motors would be their time […]

item.title: Russian Spacecraft Glitches Out on Its Way to ISS
item.description: ISS astronaut may have to manually dock the cargo spacecraft if Roscosmos fails to troubleshoot the issue.

item.title: Elizabeth Warren calls Pentagon’s decision to bar Anthropic ‘retaliation’
item.description: In a letter to Defense Secretary Pete Hegseth, Senator Elizabeth Warren (D-MA) equated the DoD's decision to label Anthropic a "supply chain risk" as retaliation, arguing that the Pentagon could simply have terminated its contract with the AI lab.

item.title: The best AirPods deals to shop ahead of Amazons Big Spring Sale — save on AirPods 4 and AirPods Pro 3
item.description: The best early AirPods deals to shop before Amazon's Big Spring Sale 2026 officially kicks off. Save on AirPods 4 and AirPods Pro 3.

item.title: FBI says Iranian hackers are using Telegram to steal data in malware attacks
item.description: Hackers working for Iran’s government are using Telegram in hacking operations that use malware to target dissidents, opposition groups, and journalists who oppose its regime, according to the FBI.

item.title: The best iPad deals to shop ahead of Amazons Big Spring Sale — score new iPads at all-time low prices
item.description: Shop the best early iPad deals from Apple during Amazon's 2026 Big Spring Sale. Save on M5 iPads at all-time low prices.

item.title: Plus confortable et plus d’autonomie qu’un Tesla Model Y : notre essai du nouveau Mercedes GLC électrique
item.description: Le best-seller mondial de l'étoile fait sa révolution ! Fini l'EQC vieillissant, place au tout nouveau Mercedes GLC électrique. Avec son autonomie annoncée à plus de 700 km, son architecture 800 volts pour une recharge éclair et son "Hyperscreen" spectaculaire, le SUV allemand se donne les moyens de bousculer les Tesla Model Y et BMW iX3. Mais derrière cette fiche technique alléchante et son confort de sénateur, ce poids lourd de plus de 2,5 tonnes tient-il vraiment toutes ses promesses sur la route ? Nous sommes partis l'essayer au Portugal pour en avoir le cœur net. ...

item.title: LG Claims Its Latest Laptop Displays Save Nearly 50% Battery Life
item.description: A bigger battery isn't the only way to squeeze more hours out of laptops.

item.title: Gemini dans Dragon Quest, Copilot dans Xbox : les bots IA s’invitent dans les jeux vidéo
item.description: Les joueurs vont devoir se faire une raison : les bots IA vont apparaitre dans leurs jeux, qu'ils le veuillent ou non. Microsoft va déployer Copilot dans les Xbox, tandis que Square Enix et Google ont annoncé l'intégration de Gemini dans Dragon Quest X. Une idée qui pourrait intéresser bien d'autres éditeurs… mais qu'en est-il des joueurs ?

item.title: Sam Altman-backed fusion startup Helion in talks with OpenAI
item.description: Helion is reportedly negotiating a deal that would see it sell 12.5% of its power output to OpenAI.

item.title: Gaze Into the Haunting, Tiny Eyes of Lego Yoda
item.description: Seen some things, this Lego Yoda bust has.

item.title: Quordle hints and answers for Tuesday, March 24 (game #1520)
item.description: Looking for Quordle clues? We can help. Plus get the answers to Quordle today and past solutions.

item.title: NYT Connections hints and answers for Tuesday, March 24 (game #1017)
item.description: Looking for NYT Connections answers and hints? Here's all you need to know to solve today's game, plus my commentary on the puzzles.

item.title: NYT Strands hints and answers for Tuesday, March 24 (game #751)
item.description: Looking for NYT Strands answers and hints? Here's all you need to know to solve today's game, including the spangram.

item.title: What is the release date for Invincible season 4 episode 4 on Prime Video?
item.description: Invincible season 4's next episode will be out shortly — here's when you can stream it.

item.title: Des camions-remorques sans chauffeur bientôt sur les routes
item.description: On aurait simplement dit un gros camion comme tant d’autres roulant sur une autoroute du Texas, une scène qui a inspiré des milliers de chansons country. Mais cette livraison en mai était différente : il n’y avait personne au volant.

item.title: The best MacBook deals to shop ahead of Amazons Big Spring Sale
item.description: We've rounded up the best MacBook deals available on Amazon ahead of its Big Spring Sale, which runs March 25 to 31.

item.title: Notre top des meilleurs PC portables en 2026 : ultraportables, gaming et rapport qualité/prix
item.description: Vous êtes à la recherche d'un nouvel ordinateur portable ? Entre les MacBook, Zenbook, Dell XPS, Galaxy Book… il y a de quoi faire. Nous avons testé et comparé de nombreux modèles pour vous aider à trouver le meilleur PC portable, selon vos critères et budget.

item.title: Your Home Could Soon Be Uninsurable If You’re in One of These States
item.description: Home insurance is buckling under climate risk and construction trends. Find out how your state fares.

item.title: This controversial statue was dumped in a harbor. Now Trump has a replica near the White House
item.description: The statue of Christopher Columbus is a replica of one that was tossed into Baltimore’s harbor by protesters in 2020. A statue of Christopher Columbus has been placed on the grounds of the Eisenhower Executive Office Building adjacent to the White House, the latest effort by President Donald Trump’s administration to recognize the controversial explorer.The statue is a replica of one that was tossed into Baltimore’s harbor in 2020 during Trump’s first term at a time of nationwide protests against institutional racism.Trump endorses a traditional view of Columbus as a leader of the 1492 mission...

item.title: Il aspire, démêle et lave : ce Dyson V12s Detect Submarine perd plus de 200 € pour nettoyer vos intérieurs de fond en comble
item.description: Le Dyson V12s Detect Submarine propose une bonne puissance d'aspiration et permet non seulement d'aspirer mais aussi de laver. Son prix passe de 719 euros à 499 euros sur le site officiel.

item.title: Microsoft fixes nasty Windows 11 bug that breaks Edge, OneDrive, and other apps, but you won't get it automatically — here's what you need to do
item.description: Frustrated by that bug that breaks Edge, OneDrive, and other apps in Windows 11? There's a fix — and this is how you get it.

item.title: Wheely, an on-demand chauffeur app, makes its US debut in NYC
item.description: When the Uber Black isn't premium enough, New Yorkers now have the option to call for a Wheely instead. Whimsical name aside, the London-based company is breaking into the US market by offering its chauffeur-hailing services to residents of New York City first, as first reported by Bloomberg. Think of it like Uber, but for business executives and VIPs who prefer better service and riding in Cadillacs and Mercedes. "New York has long been requested by our customers, whether that be New Yorkers who have traveled with us in Europe and the Middle East, or our international clients who regularly vi...

item.title: 'Some of my least favorite headphones to test': I used the Samsung Galaxy Buds 4 for a month, and one issue makes them very hard to recommend
item.description: Samsung's mid-ranged earbuds aim to offer an alternative affordable option to the brand's top-priced Buds, but they're not a worthy substitute.

item.title: iPhone Fold : l’écran serait pris en sandwich entre deux couches de verre pour éviter les plis
item.description: Apple envisagerait un système où l'écran de l'iPhone Fold prendrait place entre deux panneaux de verre ultra-fin. Une manière de mieux contrôler la pliure.

item.title: "It would be better to have a framework": Watchdog says UK government's £1.5 billion bailout to Jaguar Land Rover after cyberattack leaves big questions to be answered
item.description: For some, the bailout is an unfortunate precedent as other similar victims might ask for help as well.

item.title: OnlyFans Owner Dies of Cancer at 43
item.description: The billionaire entrepreneur Leonid Radvinsky led the company through its meteoric rise in the porn industry.

item.title: Crimson Desert : il y a des éléments créés par IA dans le jeu, les développeurs s’excusent
item.description: Des joueurs ont repéré des éléments générés par l'intelligence artificielle dans Crimson Desert. Ce n'était pas intentionnel d'après le studio.

item.title: Federal immigration agents filmed making airport arrests as Trump calls in ICE to ease security line delays
item.description: The Trump administration has deployed ICE agents to over a dozen U.S. airports amid an ongoing federal shutdown that's causing long wait times. Eyewitnesses have already recorded at least one arrest in San Francisco's airport.

item.title: Smart TV et assistants vocaux : la guerre des écrans se joue à Bruxelles
item.description: Plusieurs grands groupes audiovisuels, dont Canal+, TF1, RTL ou encore Disney, ont demandé à la Commission européenne de considérer les systèmes d'exploitation des box de streaming et des téléviseurs connectés comme des contrôleurs d'accès en vertu du DMA. Android TV, Fire OS, Tizen ou encore tvOS devraient dès lors faire plus de place à la concurrence, mais rien n'est encore décidé....
